creator: ronald-lists@klop.ws
text:
Created attachment 149750
add extra master site url

From pkg-fallout@freebsd.org I received an email stating:

=======================<phase: fetch          >============================
=> Browser282b2.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://web.talf.org/software/Browser282b2.tar.gz
fetch: http://web.talf.org/software/Browser282b2.tar.gz: Operation timed out
=> Attempting to fetch http://freebsd.nsu.ru/distfiles/Browser282b2.tar.gz
fetch: http://freebsd.nsu.ru/distfiles/Browser282b2.tar.gz: No address record
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/Browser282b2.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/Browser282b2.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /portdistfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1
 
Stop in /usr/ports/net/ldapbrowser.

I saw freebsd.nsu.ru is hosting the file again, but to be sure it is available I added an extra site to download the distfile.
